audience_policies.source_phrase: Pass admits up to four (4) people at $2 per person (children under 2 are free) to any Mass Audubon wildlife sanctuary. Hours of operation vary by sanctuary. Please check https://www.massaudubon.org/places-to-explore/trails before planning a visit.
